title: HONG MASUAN IN KHUA VAK AW

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tua bangin thungetna, ni dang lai-in, om ngei lo hi;
Ka teelsa lam ka zuih hangin tuni, nong
Kisak theihna ding in ka deih kei mah’n,
ka kiphasak, ka mawh na ngaih sun ken.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sawtpi nang mah’n thupha nong piak manin; hong pia lai in;
Gam kuam mual kal tuipi kheng
Topa in, lam hong hilh ta,
Khuavak ciang in sau veipi ka it mi,
Lungdamin ah kei mah’n ka um
